name: @minhbc97/lunar
description: Vietnamese lunar calendar utilities — stable types, holidays, and almanac for Lịch An Gia
author: Lịch An Gia

scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.publish:dry: npm run build && npm publish --access public --dry-run
scripts.publish:npm: npm run build && npm test && npm publish --access public
